member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig
member.summary: Configuration settings for the CentralBrain component.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.ErrorCheckInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval for error checking timer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.StartupRetryInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval for startup retry timer when internet is down.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.SnapshotInitialDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial delay before starting snapshot timer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.OvernightStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the time of day to start overnight tasks (e.g., 3:00 AM).

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.OvernightTaskDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay after overnight start time to execute tasks.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig
member.summary: Configuration settings for the CentralErrorHandler component that manages error processing, catastrophic failure detection, and internet connectivity monitoring.
member.remarks: This configuration allows customization of error handling behavior including: - Time window for error frequency monitoring - Threshold for triggering catastrophic failure detection - Parameters for internet connectivity check retry logic

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig.ErrorWindowMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the time window in minutes for monitoring error frequency. Errors occurring within this window are counted toward the catastrophic threshold.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig.ErrorThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the threshold number of non-catastrophic errors within the monitoring window that triggers catastrophic failure detection and system restart.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig.InternetCheckMaxAttempts
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of attempts for internet connectivity checks before declaring the connection as failed.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig.InternetCheckInitialDelayMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial delay in milliseconds between internet connectivity check attempts. This delay doubles with each retry attempt until reaching the maximum delay.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ErrorHandlerConfig.InternetCheckMaxDelayMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum delay in milliseconds between internet connectivity check attempts. The delay will not exceed this value even after exponential backoff.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.QueueHighCountAlertThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the percentage threshold for queue high count alerts. When the EventQueue utilization exceeds this percentage, a performance alert is logged.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.RefreshUsageAlertThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the percentage threshold for refresh usage alerts. When the market refresh cycle usage exceeds this percentage, a performance alert is logged.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.QueueCountAlertThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute count threshold for queue alerts. When any queue's average count exceeds this value, a performance alert is logged.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.RetryDelayMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry delay in milliseconds for operations that require retries.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.SessionIdLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the session identifier string.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerConnectionTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in seconds for connection attempts to the overseer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerSemaphoreTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in seconds for semaphore operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerDiscoveryIntervalMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval in minutes for overseer discovery operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerCheckInIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval in seconds for check-in operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerCircuitBreakerFailureThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the failure threshold for the circuit breaker pattern.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OverseerCircuitBreakerTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in minutes for the circuit breaker to reset.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OvernightBatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the batch size for overnight market refresh operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.OvernightRetryDelayMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry delay in minutes for overnight market refresh operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.InterestScoreAgeThresholdHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the age threshold in hours for interest score calculations. Markets with interest scores older than this will be recalculated.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MarketRefreshCircuitBreakerFailureThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the failure threshold for the market refresh circuit breaker.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MarketRefreshCircuitBreakerTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in minutes for the market refresh circuit breaker to reset.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.ConnectionHealthCheckIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection health check interval in seconds.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.ConnectionHealthTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection timeout in seconds for health monitoring.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.AuthTokenValidityHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the authentication token validity duration in hours.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.HandshakeRateLimitPerMinute
member.summary: Gets or sets the rate limit for handshake operations per minute per IP.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.CheckInRateLimitPerMinute
member.summary: Gets or sets the rate limit for check-in operations per minute per client.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MessageBatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the message batch size for broadcast operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MessageBatchIntervalMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the message batch processing interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.StaleConnectionCleanupIntervalMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the stale connection cleanup interval in minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MaxConnectionAgeMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum age for connections to be considered stale in minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.CandlestickDataRetentionDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the data retention period in days for candlestick data. Data older than this will be subject to cleanup.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.CandlestickCleanupIntervalHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the cleanup interval in hours for removing old candlestick data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MaxCandlesticksPerMarket
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of candlesticks to keep per market per interval.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MaxParallelCandlestickTasks
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of parallel tasks for candlestick processing.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.MaxDegreeOfParallelismDataLoading
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum degree of parallelism for data loading operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.EnableCandlestickPerformanceMetrics
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable performance metrics collection for candlestick operations.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig.CandlestickPerformanceMetricsLogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the log level for performance metrics.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.InterestScoreConfig
member.summary: Configuration class for InterestScoreService settings. Controls cache duration, performance monitoring, and operational parameters for the interest scoring system. These settings can be configured via appsettings.json and are injected through dependency injection.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.InterestScoreConfig.CacheDurationHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache duration in hours for percentile thresholds and market values. Default is 6 hours. Increasing this reduces database queries but may use stale data. Lower values provide more current data but increase computational overhead.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.InterestScoreConfig.EnablePerformanceMetrics
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable performance metrics collection. When enabled, tracks scoring operation times, cache hit rates, and other performance indicators. Disabling this improves performance but removes monitoring capabilities.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.InterestScoreConfig.MaxPerformanceMetricsHistory
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of performance metrics to retain in memory. Older metrics are discarded when this limit is reached to prevent memory leaks. Higher values provide better historical analysis but consume more memory.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig
member.summary: Configuration class for market data settings.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.SemaphoreTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the semaphore timeout in milliseconds. Default is 5000.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.TickerBatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the ticker batch size. Default is 100.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.ApiRetryTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the API retry timeout in milliseconds. Default is 30000.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.Validate(System.String,BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig)
member.summary: Validates the configuration options.
member.param: The name of the options instance being validated.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.CacheDirectory
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory path where simulation cache files and reports are stored. This directory is created automatically if it doesn't exist.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.ProcessingTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in seconds for processing market data during simulation. Default is 300 seconds (5 minutes).

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.MarketDataFileNamePattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the file naming pattern for market data JSON files. Supports placeholders: {market}, {label}, {strategy}, {timestamp}. Default pattern: "{market}_{label}_{strategy}_{timestamp}.json"

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.ResearchBusFileNamePattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the file naming pattern for ResearchBus CSV files. Supports placeholders: {label}, {timestamp}. Default pattern: "{label}_ResearchBus_{timestamp}.csv"

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.BestFitReportFileNamePattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the file naming pattern for best-fit report CSV files. Supports placeholders: {label}, {timestamp}. Default pattern: "{label}_BestFitReport_{timestamp}.csv"

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.DiscrepancyThresholdPercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the percentage threshold for detecting widespread discrepancies in snapshots. Used to determine when discrepancies indicate a systemic issue. Default is 10%.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.EnableSnapshotValidation
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable validation of market snapshots before processing. When enabled, snapshots are checked for data integrity and completeness. Default is true.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.SimulatorConfig.MinSnapshotCountForValidation
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum number of snapshots required for validation to be meaningful. Markets with fewer snapshots will still be processed but with warnings. Default is 1.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Converters.MarketSnapshotSlimConverter
member.summary: Recursively slims EVERY MarketSnapshot field for the RawJSON payload. - Write: long → short across the entire JSON tree. - Read: short → long across the entire JSON tree (back-compat). Orderbook rows remain handled by OrderbookSlimConverter.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.APICandlestick
member.summary: Represents a single candlestick data point for a Kalshi market, including price and volume info.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.BalanceResponse
member.summary: Represents a user's account balance response from the Kalshi API.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.CandlestickResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing candlestick data for a specific market on Kalshi.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.EventPosition
member.summary: Represents a user's aggregated position for an event across multiple markets on Kalshi.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.ExchangeStatus
member.summary: Represents the operational status of the Kalshi exchange and trading system.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.KalshiMarket
member.summary: Represents a market on the Kalshi platform with details such as ticker, prices, and trading status.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.MarketPositionApi
member.summary: Represents a user's position in a specific Kalshi market, including trading stats and profit/loss.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.MarketResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing a list of Kalshi markets and pagination info.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderApi
member.summary: Represents an order placed on the Kalshi platform with details about its status and execution.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderbookMessage
member.summary: Represents a message containing order book data, either as a snapshot or delta update.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderbookMessage.#ctor(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OrderbookMessage class from JSON data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrdersResponse.Cursor
member.summary: Gets or sets the pagination cursor for retrieving the next set of orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrdersResponse.Orders
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of orders retrieved in the response.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PositionsResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing market and event position data.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PriceData
member.summary: Represents price-related data for a market or event.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PriceLevel
member.summary: Represents a price level in the order book with price and resting contract details.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot
member.summary:
Represents a complete snapshot of market data at a specific point in time, used for historical record storage and trading strategy analysis. This DTO captures all relevant market state including order book, positions, technical indicators, and calculated metrics.
MarketSnapshot is created from MarketData instances and serialized for persistence. It includes: - Market identification and metadata (ticker, category, status) - Current order book state with bid/ask prices and depths - Position information and P&L calculations - Technical indicators and trading metrics - Historical price data and support/resistance levels - Calculated velocities, spreads, and market statistics
The snapshot schema evolves over time, with version tracking to ensure backward compatibility during upgrades and data migration.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderbookData
member.summary: Gets or sets the current order book data, containing active buy and sell orders.
member.remarks: Stores a list of dictionaries with order details (price, side, resting contracts, last modified date). Sourced from MarketData.OrderbookData and converted via ConvertOrderbookData. Updated via WebSocket events by OrderBookService. Null if no data is available.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeHighYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time high bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 72 = $0.72). Sourced from MarketData.AllTimeHighYes_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidHigh. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeLowYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time low bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 28 = $0.28). Sourced from MarketData.AllTimeLowYes_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidLow. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeHighNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time high bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 72 = $0.72). Sourced from MarketData.AllTimeHighNo_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidHigh. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeLowNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time low bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 28 = $0.28). Sourced from MarketData.AllTimeLowNo_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidLow. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentHighYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent high bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 68 = $0.68). Sourced from MarketData.RecentHighYes_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidHigh. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentLowYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent low bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 32 = $0.32). Sourced from MarketData.RecentLowYes_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidLow. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentHighNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent high bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 68 = $0.68). Sourced from MarketData.RecentHighNo_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidHigh. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentLowNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent low bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 32 = $0.32). Sourced from MarketData.RecentLowNo_Bid, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.BidLow. Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllSupportResistanceLevels
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of historical support and resistance levels for the market.
member.remarks: Contains key price levels (in cents) with strength, touches, and volume data. Sourced from MarketData.AllSupportResistanceLevels, calculated by TradingCalculator.CalculateHistoricalSupportResistance using minute candlesticks. Levels are filtered for statistical significance, excluding data from 07:00:00 to 11:59:00 UTC.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position size (number of contracts held).
member.remarks: Positive for "Yes" (long), negative for "No" (short) positions. Sourced from MarketData.PositionSize, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketData.Positions. 0 if no position exists. Side is indicated by PositionSide.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketExposure
member.summary: Gets or sets the total market exposure of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Total cost of contracts held, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from MarketData.MarketExposure, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketPosition.MarketExposure. Absolute value, 0 if no position.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BuyinPrice
member.summary: Gets or sets the average buy-in price per contract in dollars.
member.remarks: Average price paid per contract (MarketExposure / |PositionSize|), in dollars. Sourced from MarketData.BuyinPrice, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata. 0 if no position or PositionSize is 0.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionUpside
member.summary: Gets or sets the potential upside of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Potential gain if held to resolution and outcome favors position, in dollars. Sourced from MarketData.PositionUpside, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata as max payout ($1/contract * |PositionSize|) minus liquidation value. Uses order book or current prices. 0 if no position or data unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionDownside
member.summary: Gets or sets the potential downside of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Potential loss if liquidated at current prices, as negative liquidation value in dollars. Sourced from MarketData.PositionDownside, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata using order book or current prices. Typically negative, 0 if no position or data unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalTraded
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of contracts traded for the current position.
member.remarks: Cumulative contracts traded (bought/sold) for the position. Sourced from MarketData.TotalPositionTraded, retrieved by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketPosition.TotalTraded. 0 if no position. Non-negative integer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RestingOrders
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting orders for the market.
member.remarks: Count of open orders (e.g., limit orders) waiting to be filled. Sourced from MarketData.RestingOrders, retrieved by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketPosition.RestingOrdersCount. 0 if no orders or position. Non-negative integer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RealizedPnl
member.summary: Gets or sets the realized profit and loss (PnL) for the position in dollars.
member.remarks: Net profit/loss from closed trades, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from MarketData.RealizedPnl, retrieved by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketPosition.RealizedPnl. Positive for profit, negative for loss, 0 if no closed trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.FeesPaid
member.summary: Gets or sets the total fees paid for trades in dollars.
member.remarks: Cumulative trading fees for all trades, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from MarketData.FeesPaid, retrieved by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata from MarketPosition.FeesPaid. Non-negative, 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionROI
member.summary: Gets or sets the return on investment (ROI) for the position as a percentage.
member.remarks: Percentage return: (liquidation price - BuyinPrice) / BuyinPrice * 100. Sourced from MarketData.PositionROI, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata using order book or current prices. 0 if no position, BuyinPrice is 0, or data unavailable. Positive for profit, negative for loss.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionROIAmt
member.summary: Gets or sets the return on investment (ROI) for the position as a dollar amount.
member.remarks: Sourced from MarketData.PositionROIAmount, calculated by MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata using order book or current prices.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ExpectedFees
member.summary: Gets the expected trading fees for selling the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Calculated using the formula: fees = roundup(0.07 * C * P * (1-P)), where C is the number of contracts (absolute position size), P is the liquidation price in dollars, and roundup rounds to the next cent. Fees are summed across price levels in the order book when available, or based on the current bid (for "yes" positions) or ask (for "no" positions) price if no orders exist. Only applied for takers, not makers. Sourced from MarketData.RefreshPositionMetadata. Returns 0 if no position exists, position size is 0, or data is unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeRatePerMinute_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade rate for "Yes" side trades, in trades per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "Yes" side trades (taker side = "no") within the change window. Sourced from MarketData.TradeRatePerMinute_Yes, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeRatePerMinute_MakerYes. Number of trades divided by elapsed minutes (capped at OrderbookChangeTracker.ChangeWindowDuration). 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeRatePerMinute_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade rate for "No" side trades, in trades per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "No" side trades (taker side = "yes") within the change window. Sourced from MarketData.TradeRatePerMinute_No, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeRatePerMinute_MakerNo. Number of trades divided by elapsed minutes (capped at OrderbookChangeTracker.ChangeWindowDuration). 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeVolumePerMinute_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade volume rate for "Yes" side trades, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "Yes" side trade volume within the change window. Sourced from MarketData.TradeVolumePerMinute_Yes, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeRatePerMinute_MakerYes. Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) of trade-related changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeVolumePerMinute_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade volume rate for "No" side trades, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "No" side trade volume within the change window. Sourced from MarketData.TradeVolumePerMinute_No, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeRatePerMinute_MakerNo. Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) of trade-related changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AverageTradeSize_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the average dollar size of "Yes" side trades.
member.remarks: Average dollar value per "Yes" side trade (taker side = "no"). Sourced from MarketData.AverageTradeSize_Yes, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetAverageTradeSize_MakerYes. Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) divided by trade count. 0 if no trades. Trade count in TradeCount_Yes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AverageTradeSize_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the average dollar size of "No" side trades.
member.remarks: Average dollar value per "No" side trade (taker side = "yes"). Sourced from MarketData.AverageTradeSize_No, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetAverageTradeSize_MakerNo. Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) divided by trade count. 0 if no trades. Trade count in TradeCount_No.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeCount_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of "Yes" side trades.
member.remarks: Count of trades with "Yes" as the maker side (taker side = "no"). Sourced from MarketData.TradeCount_Yes, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeCount_MakerYes. Tracks trades in OrderbookChangeTracker.TradeEvent. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeCount_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of "No" side trades.
member.remarks: Count of trades with "No" as the maker side (taker side = "yes"). Sourced from MarketData.TradeCount_No, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTradeCount_MakerNo. Tracks trades in OrderbookChangeTracker.TradeEvent. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the count of non-trade-related "Yes" side order book changes.
member.remarks: Number of "Yes" side order book changes not linked to trades. Sourced from MarketData.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_Yes, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetYesNetOrderRatePerMinute. Tracks changes in OrderbookChangeTracker.OrderbookChange with OrderbookChangeTracker.OrderbookChange.IsTradeRelated set to false.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the count of non-trade-related "No" side order book changes.
member.remarks: Number of "No" side order book changes not linked to trades. Sourced from MarketData.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_No, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.RefreshTradeChangeOverTimeMetrics using OrderbookChangeTracker.GetNoNetOrderRatePerMinute. Tracks changes in OrderbookChangeTracker.OrderbookChange with OrderbookChangeTracker.OrderbookChange.IsTradeRelated set to false.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Day
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest daily trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single day, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.HighestVolume_Day, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using day candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no day candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Hour
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest hourly trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single hour, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.HighestVolume_Hour, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using hour candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no hour candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Minute
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest minute trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single minute, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.HighestVolume_Minute, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no minute candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastHour
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last hour.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last hour, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.RecentVolume_LastHour, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastThreeHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last three hours.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last three hours, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.RecentVolume_LastThreeHours, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastMonth
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last month.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last month, in contracts. Sourced from MarketData.RecentVolume_LastMonth, calculated by CandlestickService.PopulateMarketDataAsync using minute candlesticks' CandlestickData.Volume. 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for bottom "Yes" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "Yes" bid prices below 90% of MarketData.BestYesBid. Sourced from MarketData.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_Yes_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetBottomYesVelocityPerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in LevelCount_Bottom_Yes_Bid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Bottom_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for bottom "Yes" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "Yes" bid price levels below 90% of MarketData.BestYesBid used in VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_Yes_Bid. Sourced from MarketData.LevelCount_Bottom_Yes_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetBottomYesVelocityPerMinute. 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for bottom "No" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "No" bid prices below 90% of MarketData.BestNoBid. Sourced from MarketData.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_No_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetBottomNoVelocityPerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in LevelCount_Bottom_No_Bid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Bottom_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for bottom "No" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "No" bid price levels below 90% of MarketData.BestNoBid used in VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_No_Bid. Sourced from MarketData.LevelCount_Bottom_No_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetBottomNoVelocityPerMinute. 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Top_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for top "Yes" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "Yes" bid prices at or above 90% of MarketData.BestYesBid. Sourced from MarketData.VelocityPerMinute_Top_Yes_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTopYesVelocityPerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in LevelCount_Top_Yes_Bid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Top_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for top "Yes" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "Yes" bid price levels at or above 90% of MarketData.BestYesBid used in VelocityPerMinute_Top_Yes_Bid. Sourced from MarketData.LevelCount_Top_Yes_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTopYesVelocityPerMinute. 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Top_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for top "No" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "No" bid prices at or above 90% of MarketData.BestNoBid. Sourced from MarketData.VelocityPerMinute_Top_No_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTopNoVelocityPerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in LevelCount_Top_No_Bid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Top_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for top "No" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "No" bid price levels at or above 90% of MarketData.BestNoBid used in VelocityPerMinute_Top_No_Bid. Sourced from MarketData.LevelCount_Top_No_Bid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetTopNoVelocityPerMinute. 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalOrderbookDepth_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total orderbook depth.
member.remarks: Total orderbook depth, in cents Sourced from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalOrderbookDepth_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total orderbook depth.
member.remarks: Total orderbook depth, in cents Sourced from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "Yes" contracts, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BestYesBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "No" contracts, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BestNoBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesBidD
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "Yes" contracts, in cents. This is the dollars version of the price which is included to ease the transition later. Sourced from MarketData.BestYesBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoBidD
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" bid price in the order book. This is the dollars version of the price which is included to ease the transition later.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "No" contracts, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BestNoBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesAsk
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" ask price in the order book.
member.remarks: Lowest price offered to sell "Yes" contracts (equals best "No" bid), in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BestYesAsk, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoAsk
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" ask price in the order book.
member.remarks: Lowest price offered to sell "No" contracts (equals best "Yes" bid), in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BestNoAsk, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.YesSpread
member.summary: Gets or sets the spread between "Yes" ask and bid prices.
member.remarks: Difference between BestYesAsk and BestYesBid, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.YesSpread. 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NoSpread
member.summary: Gets or sets the spread between "No" ask and bid prices.
member.remarks: Difference between BestNoAsk and BestNoBid, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.NoSpread. 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtBestYesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting contracts at the best "Yes" bid price.
member.remarks: Total contracts at BestYesBid. Sourced from MarketData.DepthAtBestYesBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtBestNoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting contracts at the best "No" bid price.
member.remarks: Total contracts at BestNoBid. Sourced from MarketData.DepthAtBestNoBid, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the cumulative resting contracts for "Yes" bid orders within tolerance.
member.remarks: Total contracts for "Yes" bids within TolerancePercentage below BestYesBid. Sourced from MarketData.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_Yes, computed by MarketData.CalculateCumulativeDepth. 0 if no orders within range.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the cumulative resting contracts for "No" bid orders within tolerance.
member.remarks: Total contracts for "No" bids within TolerancePercentage below BestNoBid. Sourced from MarketData.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_No, computed by MarketData.CalculateCumulativeDepth. 0 if no orders within range.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidRange_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the price range of "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Difference between highest and lowest "Yes" bid prices, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BidRange_Yes, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidRange_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the price range of "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Difference between highest and lowest "No" bid prices, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.BidRange_No, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalBidContracts_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Total contracts available for "Yes" bids. Sourced from MarketData.TotalBidContracts_Yes, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalBidContracts_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Total contracts available for "No" bids. Sourced from MarketData.TotalBidContracts_No, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidCountImbalance
member.summary: Gets or sets the imbalance between "Yes" and "No" bid contracts.
member.remarks: Difference: TotalBidContracts_Yes - TotalBidContracts_No. Sourced from MarketData.BidImbalance. Positive for "Yes" dominance, negative for "No". 0 if no bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidVolumeImbalance
member.summary: Gets or sets the imbalance between "Yes" and "No" bid contracts * price.
member.remarks: Difference: TotalBidContracts_Yes - TotalBidContracts_No. Sourced from MarketData.BidImbalance. Positive for "Yes" dominance, negative for "No". 0 if no bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtTop4YesBids
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for top four "Yes" bid price levels.
member.remarks: Sum of contracts at four highest "Yes" bid prices. Sourced from MarketData.DepthAtTop4YesBids, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. Sums all levels if fewer than four. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtTop4NoBids
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for top four "No" bid price levels.
member.remarks: Sum of contracts at four highest "No" bid prices. Sourced from MarketData.DepthAtTop4NoBids, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData using MarketData.GetBids. Sums all levels if fewer than four. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RSI_Short
member.summary: Gets or sets the short-term RSI (14 periods, minute candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (0-100) for "Yes" side, using minute candlesticks. Sourced from MarketData.RSI_Short, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateRSI. Null if less than 15 candlesticks or invalid. greater than 70 overbought, less than 30 oversold.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RSI_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term RSI (14 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (0-100) for "Yes" side, using hour candlesticks. Sourced from MarketData.RSI_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateRSI. Null if less than 15 candlesticks or invalid. greater than 70 overbought, less than 30 oversold.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RSI_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term RSI (14 periods, day candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (0-100) for "Yes" side, using day candlesticks. Sourced from MarketData.RSI_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateRSI. Null if less than 15 candlesticks or invalid. greater than 70 overbought, less than 30 oversold.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MACD_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term MACD (12, 26, 9 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: MACD line, signal line, and histogram for trend and momentum. Sourced from MarketData.MACD_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateMACD. Null if less than 35 candlesticks or invalid. Uses MACDConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MACD_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term MACD (12, 26, 9 periods, day candlesticks).
member.remarks: MACD line, signal line, and histogram for trend and momentum. Sourced from MarketData.MACD_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateMACD. Null if less than 35 candlesticks or invalid. Uses MACDConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.EMA_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term EMA (14 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Weighted moving average for "Yes" side, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.EMA_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateEMA. Null if less than 14 candlesticks or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.EMA_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term EMA (14 periods, day candlesticks).
member.remarks: Weighted moving average for "Yes" side, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.EMA_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateEMA. Null if less than 14 candlesticks or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BollingerBands_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term Bollinger Bands (20 periods, hour candlesticks, 2 std dev).
member.remarks: SMA (Middle), Upper, and Lower bands for volatility. Sourced from MarketData.BollingerBands_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateBollingerBands. Upper/Lower null if less than 20 candlesticks or invalid, Middle may be valid. In cents. Uses BollingerBandsConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BollingerBands_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term Bollinger Bands (20 periods, day candlesticks, 2 std dev).
member.remarks: SMA (Middle), Upper, and Lower bands for volatility. Sourced from MarketData.BollingerBands_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateBollingerBands. Upper/Lower null if less than 20 candlesticks or invalid, Middle may be valid. In cents. Uses BollingerBandsConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ATR_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term ATR (14 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Average price range for volatility, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.ATR_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateATR. Null if less than 15 candlesticks or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ATR_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term ATR (14 periods, day candlesticks).
member.remarks: Average price range for volatility, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.ATR_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateATR. Null if less than 15 candlesticks or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VWAP_Short
member.summary: Gets or sets the short-term VWAP (15 periods, minute candlesticks).
member.remarks: Volume-weighted average price, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.VWAP_Short, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateVWAP. Null if insufficient data, zero volume, or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VWAP_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term VWAP (15 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Volume-weighted average price, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.VWAP_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateVWAP. Null if insufficient data, zero volume, or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.StochasticOscillator_Short
member.summary: Gets or sets the short-term Stochastic Oscillator (K=14, D=3, minute candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (%K, %D, 0-100) for price range. Sourced from MarketData.StochasticOscillator_Short, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateStochastic. %D null if less than 14 candlesticks or invalid; %K computed if possible. Uses StochasticOscillatorConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.StochasticOscillator_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term Stochastic Oscillator (K=14, D=3, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (%K, %D, 0-100) for price range. Sourced from MarketData.StochasticOscillator_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateStochastic. %D null if less than 14 candlesticks or invalid; %K computed if possible. Uses StochasticOscillatorConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.StochasticOscillator_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term Stochastic Oscillator (K=14, D=3, day candlesticks).
member.remarks: Momentum indicator (%K, %D, 0-100) for price range. Sourced from MarketData.StochasticOscillator_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateStochastic. %D null if less than 14 candlesticks or invalid; %K computed if possible. Uses StochasticOscillatorConverter for JSON.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OBV_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term OBV (hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Cumulative volume based on price direction. Sourced from MarketData.OBV_Medium, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateOBV. 0 if less than 2 candlesticks. Positive/negative for buying/selling pressure.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OBV_Long
member.summary: Gets or sets the long-term OBV (day candlesticks).
member.remarks: Cumulative volume based on price direction. Sourced from MarketData.OBV_Long, computed by TradingCalculator.CalculateOBV. 0 if less than 2 candlesticks. Positive/negative for buying/selling pressure.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ChangeMetricsMature
member.summary: Gets or sets whether change metrics are mature.
member.remarks: Indicates if order book change metrics are stable based on market activity duration. Sourced from MarketData.ChangeMetricsMature, determined by OrderbookChangeTracker.IsMature.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketAge
member.summary: Gets or sets the market's age.
member.remarks: Time since market opened, in days. Sourced from MarketData.MarketAge. Used to assess market maturity.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TimeLeft
member.summary: Gets or sets the time remaining until market close.
member.remarks: Time until market resolution, in days. Sourced from MarketData.TimeLeft. Negative if market is closed.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.CanCloseEarly
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the market can close early.
member.remarks: Indicates if the market may resolve before its scheduled close. Sourced from MarketData.CanCloseEarly. Affects trading strategy.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LastWebSocketMessageReceived
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp of the last WebSocket message received.
member.remarks: Indicates the most recent update from the exchange. Sourced from MarketData.LastWebSocketMessageReceived. MinValue if no messages.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketBehaviorYes
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Yes" side market behavior classification.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketBehaviorNo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "No" side market behavior classification.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.GoodBadPriceYes
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Yes" side price quality assessment.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.GoodBadPriceNo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "No" side price quality assessment.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HoldTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the holding period for the current position, in days.
member.remarks: Time since position was opened. Sourced from MarketData.HoldTime. 0 if no position.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderVolumePerMinute_YesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the order rate for "Yes" bid orders, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of non-trade-related "Yes" bid order changes. Sourced from MarketData.OrderVolumePerMinute_YesBid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetYesNetOrderRatePerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) divided by elapsed minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderVolumePerMinute_NoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the order rate for "No" bid orders, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of non-trade-related "No" bid order changes. Sourced from MarketData.OrderVolumePerMinute_NoBid, computed by OrderbookChangeTracker.GetNoNetOrderRatePerMinute. Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) divided by elapsed minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.YesBidCenterOfMass
member.summary: Gets or sets the center of mass for "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Weighted average price of "Yes" bid orders, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.YesBidCenterOfMass, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NoBidCenterOfMass
member.summary: Gets or sets the center of mass for "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Weighted average price of "No" bid orders, in cents. Sourced from MarketData.NoBidCenterOfMass, computed from MarketData.OrderbookData. 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TolerancePercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the tolerance percentage for cumulative depth calculations.
member.remarks: Percentage (e.g., 5%) used to define price range for TopTenPercentLevelDepth_Yes and TopTenPercentLevelDepth_No. Sourced from MarketData.TolerancePercentage. Typically 5%.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData
member.summary: Represents orderbook data for a specific market, focused on orderbook entries.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes orderbook data with a market ticker, orderbook, and optional MarketData reference.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.RefreshOrderbookMetadata
member.summary: Refreshes metadata based on orderbook data (placeholder).

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.MarketTicker
member.summary: Gets or sets the market ticker.
